introSection: Merkant (English: Mercant) is a steel indoor kiddie roller coaster located at Mandoria in Rzgów, Łódzkie, Poland. It is the longest indoor roller coasters in Poland.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Dark red pink track and dark purple supports.

fullText:
Merkant (English: Mercant) is a steel indoor kiddie roller coaster located at Mandoria in Rzgów, Łódzkie, Poland. It is the longest indoor roller coasters in Poland.



Dark red pink track and dark purple supports.
